content.summaryText: DASH Diet in Practice is part of Clinical Nutrition in Chronic Disease in the theme Nutrition and Metabolic Health. This module focuses on: Select sodium-smart options.

content.questionText: Which action best supports this course objective: Select sodium-smart options?
content.explanation: The best answer is the action that directly helps learners apply 'Select sodium-smart options' while studying DASH Diet in Practice.

options.text: Use a structured checklist and verify outcomes
Skip baseline assessment to save time
Rely only on memory without documentation

content.summaryText: Practical emphasis: Increase potassium-rich foods. Learners should practice concise decision-making and escalation when necessary.

content.questionText: A clear plan for 'Increase potassium-rich foods' improves consistency in DASH Diet in Practice.
content.explanation: Structured plans reduce omissions and improve safe, repeatable care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
